debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : FunCont f
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hfa : f a < 0
hfb : 0 < f b
S : Set ℝ := {x | x ∈ Icc a b ∧ f x < 0}
a_in_S : a ∈ S
Snonempty : S.Nonempty
Sbounded : IsUB S b
c : ℝ
hc : IsLUB S c
a_le_c : a ≤ c
c_le_b : c ≤ b
fc_lt : ¬f c < 0
fc_gt : ¬0 < f c
fc : f c = 0
hc' : c ∈ Icc a b
hca : a ≠ c
hcb : b ≠ c
⊢ c < b

failed_attempts:
by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have hcb' : c = b := by linarith
    have hb_in_S : b ∈ S := by
      rw [hcb'] at *
      exact hc'
    simp at hb_in_S
    linarith [hfb, hb_in_S.2]
  · assumption
exact ⟨c, hcc, fc⟩

by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h1 : a = c := by linarith
    contradiction
  exact h1
, by 
  have h2 : c < b := hc_lt_b
  exact h2
⟩, by 
  have h3 : f c = 0 := fc
  exact h3
⟩

linarith [hfa, fc]
have hb1 : c < b := by
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have h2 : c = b := by
    linarith [c_le_b, h]
  rw [show c = b by linarith [h2]] at fc
  linarith [hfb, fc]
exact ⟨c, ⟨ha1, hb1⟩, fc⟩

apply hca
    linarith
  · -- Show that c < b
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h_eq_b : c = b := by linarith [c_le_b, h]
    exfalso
    apply hcb
    linarith
exact ⟨c, hcc, fc⟩

have h2 : c < b := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h3 : c = b := by linarith [c_le_b, h]
    contradiction
  exact ⟨h1, h2⟩
exact ⟨c, hcc, fc⟩
